changes.detail: work_package_active.json currently holds work_id: LC-S2-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION with status: STARTED. The kernel will reject run_work_package.py start for this package until LC-S2-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION is finished. No prompt amendment required — this is a runtime state issue. Cursor must not touch any files until the token is cleared and re-issued for LC-PROVING-HARNESS-AUTOMATION.

All five mandatory fields present and valid. work_id=LC-PROVING-HARNESS-AUTOMATION, branch=feature/lc-proving-harness-automation, risk_level=HIGH, execution_model=TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH, change_type=MIXED. HIGH is correct per prompt rationale (affects validation infrastructure). MIXED is correct: new fixture content is CONTENT; new harness script invoking real orchestrator is BEHAVIOUR. TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH is required for all HIGH-risk work.

run_golden_panel() function confirmed at line 302. Accepts fixture_path, lifestyle_fixture_path, questionnaire_data (read from payload.get('questionnaire_data') at line 352). No separate questionnaire_data override parameter — statin-on/off differentiation must be achieved through fixture variants, not a function parameter.

verification_ledger_run.py confirmed. Already runs AB + VR panels with multiple profiles through run_golden_panel. Lines 30-34: PANELS dict with AB_full_panel_with_ranges and VR_full_panel_with_ranges. Lines 36-41: PROFILES dict with P0_no_lifestyle, P1_healthy, P2_minimal_existing_fixture, P3_stressed. Provides the structural model for the proving harness.
AB full panel fixture confirmed present. This is the canonical launch-core AB panel.
VR full panel fixture confirmed present. This is the canonical launch-core VR panel.

lifestyle_minimal.json confirmed. Contains height_cm, weight_kg, waist_circumference_cm, systolic_bp, diastolic_bp, resting_heart_rate, smoking_status, alcohol_units_per_week, sleep_hours. Suitable as lifestyle/context variant scenario input.

run_golden_panel() reads questionnaire_data from payload.get('questionnaire_data') only — no separate override parameter. To produce statin-on vs statin-off scenarios, Cursor MUST create separate fixture variants that include or omit questionnaire_data.long_term_medications containing the statin label. Do NOT modify run_golden_panel.py to add a questionnaire override — that modifies a governed tool and escalates risk. The exact SSOT-governed statin label is: 'Statins (cholesterol medication)' (STATINS_LONG_TERM_MEDICATION_LABEL at questionnaire_mapper.py:16). Statin-on fixture: add questionnaire_data: {long_term_medications: ['Statins (cholesterol medication)']} to the panel JSON.

orchestrator.py:1296 calls questionnaire_mapper.build_user_intervention_document_for_statin(questionnaire_data). This fires only when questionnaire_data long_term_medications includes 'Statins (cholesterol medication)'. Returns a schema-compliant user_intervention_document. Line 1298 passes it to build_intervention_annotations_v1(). Statin-on wiring is already in place from LC-S2.

_statin_resolved_rows() at lines 17-20 filters for lipid_lowering_statin class and produces annotation rows. This is the surface the harness output must capture to prove statin-on wording appears in the diff output.

Scope explicitly excludes new analytical logic, questionnaire strategy changes, frontend redesign, and broad Sentinel redesign. No modifications expected to backend/ssot/, backend/core/analytics/ evaluation/compiler logic, or kernel scripts. Harness is a read-only consumer of the pipeline.

Harness runs the real pipeline as a consumer — it does not modify orchestrator, signal evaluators, compilers, InsightGraph, or assembler. Determinism of the analytical engine is not at risk. Analytical truth invariants are an OBSERVED assertion in harness output, not a code change.

Prompt includes correct SOP preflight checks: branch, token, clean tree. Guardrails section prohibits scope widening, stash use, fake test-only product behaviour. If blocked: document precisely, identify bounded addendum path — no hidden redesign.
verification_clinician_report.py confirmed present. Relevant for capturing clinician summary surface in harness output as required by acceptance criteria.

stage_2a.verdict: PASS — with BLOCKER on token state

authority_files_verified.note: Core reuse tooling. run_golden_panel() at line 302 confirmed.
Model structure for harness. AB+VR panel matrix at lines 30-41.
Lifestyle fixture for context variant scenario.
Statin label at line 16, statin method at line 70.

stage_2b.intelligence_core_components_identified: NONE modified — harness is a read-only pipeline consumer
stage_2b.behavioural_surface_area: New harness script and fixture variants only. No changes to orchestrator, evaluators, compilers, or AnalysisDTO. All statin context wiring was completed in LC-S2.
stage_2b.expected_output_changes: None to the pipeline. Harness produces new comparison output artefacts in a dedicated output directory.
regression_targets: Existing golden panel tests — must pass unchanged after harness is added
Statin-on fixture must produce visible annotation in harness diff vs statin-off (proving statin wiring works)
determinism_risks: Statin-on fixture must use exact SSOT-governed label ('Statins (cholesterol medication)') — any typo produces statin-off behaviour silently. Mitigated by citation at questionnaire_mapper.py:16.

Harness comparison output must strip volatile fields (timestamps, run_ids) before diffing — otherwise every run will show false positives. run_golden_panel._strip_volatile_fields() already handles this.
